title: Morgan Stanley says salt is the new oil. Here's why and how to play it
summary: Salt demand is surging due to rapid growth in sodium-ion battery production, offering a promising alternative to traditional lithium-based energy storage. Morgan Stanley analysts see salt becoming a critical commodity comparable to oil as the battery market expands. This shift presents significant investment opportunities across salt production and energy storage supply chains.
content: Salt can become as sought-out as oil amid a boom in demand for sodium-ion batteries, according to the firm.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利表示盐是新的石油。原因以及如何参与投资
zh.summary: 由于钠离子电池生产的迅速增长，盐的需求激增，为传统锂基能源储存提供了有前景的替代方案。摩根士丹利分析师认为，随着电池市场的扩张，盐将成为与石油相当的关键商品。这一转变为盐生产和能源储存供应链创造了重大投资机会。

title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
summary: Medicare will begin covering obesity medications including GLP-1 drugs starting July 1, a landmark expansion of health benefits for seniors. However, limited public awareness campaigns from government agencies and pharmaceutical companies may leave many eligible seniors unaware of this new coverage option. The low-profile rollout could result in lower-than-expected uptake among the senior population.
content: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.

zh.title: 美国老年人即将获得医疗保险肥胖症药物覆盖——但许多人可能还不知道
zh.summary: 医疗保险将从7月1日开始覆盖肥胖症药物（包括GLP-1药物），这是老年人健康福利的里程碑式扩展。然而，政府机构和制药公司的有限宣传活动可能会让许多符合条件的老年人不知道这一新的覆盖选项。低调的推出可能会导致老年人群体的采用率低于预期。

title: Debt, AI boom and economic fragilities raise global risks, BIS says
summary: The Bank for International Settlements warned that mounting global economic risks—including elevated debt levels, the AI investment boom, and structural vulnerabilities—could destabilize the financial system if they converge. The BIS emphasized how these interconnected challenges pose significant threats to economic stability worldwide. Central banks and policymakers face mounting pressure to address these fragilities before triggering a broader crisis.
content: The central bank umbrella group's Annual Economic Report warned of a complex mix of vulnerabilities.

zh.title: 债务、人工智能热潮和经济脆弱性提高全球风险，国际清算银行表示
zh.summary: 国际清算银行警告，不断上升的全球经济风险——包括高企的债务水平、人工智能投资热潮和结构性脆弱性——如果汇聚，可能会使金融系统不稳定。国际清算银行强调了这些相互关联的挑战对全球经济稳定构成的重大威胁。中央银行和政策制定者面临越来越大的压力，需要在引发更广泛危机之前解决这些脆弱性。

title: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
summary: Industry forecasters predict the U.S. auto market will shrink significantly by 2040 due to converging headwinds including changing consumer preferences and economic pressures. This represents a fundamental structural shift rather than a cyclical downturn, with the decline expected to accelerate over the coming decade. The contraction will reshape the automotive industry and its entire supply chain.
content: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.

zh.title: "完美风暴"指向2040年美国汽车市场大幅萎缩
zh.summary: 行业预测人士预计，由于消费者偏好转变和经济压力等多重因素叠加，美国汽车市场到2040年将显著萎缩。这代表了根本性的结构性转变，而非周期性衰退，预计萎缩将在未来十年加速。这种收缩将重塑汽车行业及其整个供应链。

title: Trump again threatens Iran with annihilation as Kuwait and Bahrain report attacks
summary: Iran claimed responsibility for strikes against U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain in retaliation for American military operations near the Strait of Hormuz. Former President Trump reiterated threats of severe military action against Iran, escalating tensions in the strategically critical Middle East region. The tit-for-tat military exchanges raise the risk of further uncontrolled escalation.
content: Iran says it targeted U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain following U.S. strikes on targets in and around the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普再次威胁伊朗"毁灭"，科威特和巴林报告遭袭击
zh.summary: 伊朗声称对科威特和巴林的美军设施发动了打击，以报复美国在霍尔木兹海峡附近的军事行动。前总统特朗普重申了对伊朗采取严厉军事行动的威胁，加剧了具有战略意义的中东地区的紧张局势。这种互相报复的军事交换增加了进一步失控升级的风险。

title: Google limits Meta’s use of its Gemini AI models, FT reports
summary: Google has restricted Meta's access to its Gemini artificial intelligence models due to insufficient computing resources to meet Meta's capacity demands. The limitation underscores intense competition among tech giants for AI capabilities and highlights critical bottlenecks in GPU and infrastructure availability. The restriction could significantly impact Meta's AI development strategy and reflects broader industry infrastructure constraints.
content: Meta had sought more computing capacity than Google could provide, the Financial Times reports.

zh.title: 据英国《金融时报》报道，谷歌限制Meta使用其Gemini人工智能模型
zh.summary: 谷歌由于计算资源不足无法满足Meta的容量需求，限制了Meta对其Gemini人工智能模型的访问权限。这一限制突显了科技巨头之间在人工智能能力上的激烈竞争，并突出了GPU和基础设施可用性的关键瓶颈。这一限制可能会对Meta的人工智能发展战略产生重大影响，反映了更广泛的行业基础设施约束。

title: From protein coffee to CBD soda: How brands are cashing in on the functional beverage boom
summary: Brands are capitalizing on the functional beverage trend with products like protein coffee and CBD sodas. Starbucks EMEA beverage manager noted they're selling nearly as much protein cold foam as traditional flat whites, reflecting strong consumer demand for beverages with added health benefits.
content: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.

zh.title: 从蛋白质咖啡到CBD苏打水：品牌如何从功能饮料热潮中获利
zh.summary: 品牌正在利用功能饮料趋势获利，推出蛋白质咖啡和CBD苏打水等产品。星巴克欧中东非洲地区饮料经理指出，他们销售的蛋白质冷泡沫几乎与传统美式咖啡一样多，反映出消费者对添加健康益处饮料的强劲需求。
